name: voicebox
description: A modern text-to-speech desktop application supporting multiple TTS engines
author: voicebox contributors
_comment: Personal fork for learning Electron + React. Upstream: https://github.com/jamiepine/voicebox
_notes: TODO: explore adding Azure Cognitive Services TTS engine as a third provider option
